title: 'Stablecoin Summer': Stripe Makes Tender Offer at $159 Billion Valuation
message_html: 'Stablecoin Summer': Stripe Makes Tender Offer at $159 Billion Valuation ...
snippet: Payments giant Stripe made a tender offer valuing the firm at $159 billion as payments and stablecoin volumes rise.

title: MoonPay launches ‘Agents,’ giving AI systems wallets and onchain cash flow
message_html: MoonPay launches ‘Agents,’ giving AI systems wallets and onchain cash flow ...
snippet: MoonPay debuts infrastructure enabling AI agents to transact with stablecoins onchain as both crypto and non-crypto companies race to build the “agent economy.”
